task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located and opened the correct service request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ticket details page is open, and the request subject clearly reads 'VPN connection dropping every 30 minutes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the technician field is set to 'administrator'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Technician' field or dropdown menu on the ticket page shows 'administrator' as the selected value.

task_completion.description: Verify the status field is set to 'In Progress'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Status' field or dropdown menu on the ticket page shows 'In Progress' as the selected value.

task_completion.description: Verify the updates to the ticket were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Request updated successfully') is visible, or the ticket details page reflects the new technician and status in a saved, non-editing state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with ServiceDesk Plus.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open showing the ServiceDesk Plus interface, rather than a terminal window executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine application and did not fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web application, not a text editor or document with typed answers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to spoof the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open or being used to alter the page text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target request subject: 'VPN connection dropping every 30 minutes'. Target technician: 'administrator'. Target new status: 'In Progress'.
